name: THE REED HOTEL MELAKA
detail: Thanks all receptionist and i think the indian lady, was their manager. Friendly, helpful and efficient! Location strategic and the room was spacious! Best hospitality like 5 star hotel!
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Sunday Malacca Formerly Tun Fatimah
detail: The location is great, parking is easy. Staff is good and friendly. Room is comfortable and clean. But the deco is old. However, it is no big issue. There is bazar in front of the hotel. If you walk a little bit and across the bridge. There is famous eatary place of cendol kampung hulu. Places a bit crowded and looks famous among the locals. Only the breakfast is not much variety. But the tastes is good. Will stay again if coming to Malacca in future. Thumbs up!
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Sunday Malacca Near Jonker Street Formerly Quayside
detail: Hotel is new and modern, meaning it's all in excellent condition, unlike a lot of ageing malacca hotels. It's kept very clean, the large lobby is always sparkling. Staff are friendly and relaxed, accommodating for late arrival 1am and late check out, happy to hold luggage. Room has everything you want, kettle, complimentary water, comfortable bed, TV. The bathroom is modern and clean however the shower shares same room as toilet, so that can make the floor wet. This dries quick however so didn't bother me too much. Really excelling location right next to jonker walk - so it's easy to just walk out the door, explore!

name: Hatten Hotel Melaka
detail: we booked 2rooms and were a group of 4gurls. we took the deluxe room facing the sea. i have been to malacca many many times for the past 20yrs, at least once a year, and this is the best best best hotel ever!!! stepping in, the decor blew me off. one of the hotel guys overheard my friends and i wondering where the lifts were to get to our rooms.. n he showed us the way without us asking. opened the lift door for us! when we reached our rooms, omg! we were amazed there were 2 flat screen tvs n even a couch! the decor is superb! modern fittings.. great bed.. lovely bathroom with choice to have a rain bath... im very picky with bathrooms.. n this is just great! water heater was hot n good! u can dim the side lamps.. they even had the option to listen to music on the tv.. great! breakfast is also great by malacca standards! the best breakfast i ever had! the guy cooks omelettes fresh for u.. reminded me of my thailand hotel stays. food is great! try their nasi lemak n curry chicken!! service is impeccable! they cleared our breakfast plates as soon as we were done with it. excellent service! the location is fantastic as well! just a 10-15min walk to jonker street, a 1 min walk to mahkhota parade shopping centre and it is also directly linked to the dataran megamall by an airconditioned bridge. overall, it was fantastic!!! had our new year countdown in my room.. tv fireworks food drinks great company... best stay in malacca in my entire 20yrs travelling there. it would be great if we could open the windows so we can really smell the sea.. n the aircon doesnt seem to set to 18deg but remained at 25degree. guess its the setting. other than that, no flaws! will definitely come back n i strongly recommend ppl to stay here!!!!
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Grand Swiss-Belhotel Melaka
detail: It was the best so far in our lifes have been going for hols three to four times in a year for the past ten years n we never received a welcome like yours. The door men (2) their greetings made me feel wonderful n wanted then front office staff very good mannered n very helpful with so much of respect for us. Next day at the coffee again so plesent the staff warm welcome egg station staff the best very helpful all in we had a good bf with our table being constanly cleened of used plates. The most suprising part was when we were leaving our room on one coner n there was housekeeping staff in the other coner you know what they did ....wafe n were shouting at us good bye come again why should they even bother we only slept one nite n did not meet at all something about this hotel n the staff is so good makes u to feel at home n want to make u come and stay with them again been to malacca so many times how did I not see Avillion so clean n so peaceful inside.The mangment staff must be taking good care of their staff for them to be like that to their guest which is very hard to get these days my only wish please keep up the very good work that u all are doing. (For ur info I have stayed in hoilday inn too but...) Best wishes to all of you will come to stay there again n for longer stay this time.
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Courtyard at Heeren Boutique Hotel
detail: definitely one of the best boutique hotel in Malacca. Walking distance to all tourist side and restaurants. Only down side is it can get noisy at night (from the pubs and traffic) if you choose the main street facing rooms.

name: Vspace Guesthouse Capsule & Cafe
detail: The staff were welcoming and always ready to help.

name: Dreambox Malacca
detail: I am no regrets to booking here n enjoy my travels at here.
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Kingston Hotel 9 @ Jonker Street Malacca
detail: I travelled with two colleagues for a short break and Mimosa was referred by one among us who has used the hotel before. We were very happy with the standard of rooms and service. Although the hotel was undergoing renovations, we did not feel put out. I encountered some problems with my key card and the gracious attention rendered to resolve this problem far exceeds the standards from five star hotels that I have stayed at before. Rooms are spacious, clean and everything worked. Location on Jalan Bungah Raya was close enough to the main tourist stretch of Jonker, but not too close to be exposed to the crowds and noise. Hence we enjoyed the best of both worlds. I will definitely use the Mimosa for future trips to Malacca.
area: Malacca City Center,Malacca - View on map

name: Swing & Pillows @ Jonker Street Malacca
detail: The hotel was clean, comfortable, and well-located.
